Download Speeds
 

Posted By: jamjar
Date: Tuesday 10th August, 2004 at 23:25 GMT
  
Hey, the download speeds are currently being fixed, so hopefully they should be decent by tomorrow. Untill it is fixed please only download a maximum of one file at a time.
New Music Video
 

Posted By: jamjar
Date: Monday 9th August, 2004 at 22:58 GMT
  
Hey, I've added a new music video to the collection. It's titled 'feel so numb' and is by Josef Watkins. The sound track is by Rob Zombie; so you metal heads out there should like it.

Music Videos Section
DragonballZ Supersonic Warriors
 

Posted By: jamjar
Date: Sunday 8th August, 2004 at 16:09 GMT
  
Hey, all of you people who have been e-mailing me; asking me to put up supersonic warriors - It's now here. You can download it from the gameboy advance roms section.
Download Speeds
 

Posted By: jamjar
Date: Sunday 8th August, 2004 at 13:45 GMT
  
Hey, I've noticed the download speeds over the last day or two have been really slow; this is because there is a slight problem with our httpd server. I've been trying to get it sorted, however still no joy. I can't promise anything, but I think the download speeds should be back to normal by tuesday. Also if you havnt noticed I have put up a support us page in the miscelaneous section.
Interviews
 

Posted By: Spike
Date: Sunday 8th August, 2004 at 01:52 GMT
  
I've got the interviews up and you can check them out here: Interviews. Or you can reach them by clicking on Miscellaneous, and then click on interviews. I have only have 5 up atm: Chris Patton, Christine Auten, Michael Coleman, Doug Smith, and George Manley. Soon I should have interviews from: Richard Epcar, Kyle Hebert, Joshua Seth, Jay Hickman, Jennifer Sekiguchi, Sandra Marie, and Vic Mignogna.
Some New Things
 

Posted By: jamjar
Date: Saturday 7th August, 2004 at 15:16 GMT
  
Hey, I've been busy yestarday and today adding some new things to the site. Firstly I've put the whole series of dragonball gt online for you to download; people who live in countries where dbgt does not air will finally have a chance to see it. I have re-arranged the miscellaneous section; I have not yet had a chance to update the webmasters resources section, however I will be doing so soon. I know it may seem a bit pointless, but I've added a blacklist, because I'm sick of people ripping our layouts. The best thing, however; for you anime fans out there is the 'learn japanese' section I've put up where you can download japanese audio lessons.

With all these new downloads, dbgt will be using up a hell of alot more bandwidth; this as you know is not free so I will be putting up donate button allowing you to support dbgt through paypal.

You have probably also noticed an extra advertisement; hostXl's. If you need hosting go to hostXL, they're is great value for money and have some amazing servers. They're cheapest plan is only $4.95 and offers you 1GB of space with 40GB/month bandwidth.
Finally Back Up
 

Posted By: jamjar
Date: Friday 6th August, 2004 at 23:12 GMT
  
Hey, I'm really sorry about all of this downtime, unfortunately there was nothing I could do about it. Out of ten servers which were purchased, it was mine that had to screw up. While were up I suggest you make the most of it, as I'm not sure how much longer it will be for; I don't want to make any promises about uptime. I just hope everything goes smoothly now.

Dante and Spike had the idea of introducing a discussion forum to the site; please tell us what you think by voting on the poll.
Login Not Working
 

Posted By: jamjar
Date: Thursday 5th August, 2004 at 15:23 GMT
  
Hey, The login system is temporarily down because there is something wrong with the /tmp directory on our server. I've sent in a support request; so everything should be working within a few hours.
New Server
 

Posted By: jamjar
Date: Tuesday 3rd August, 2004 at 14:07 GMT
  
Hey, the new server is up amd running, please enjoy! We have some kl stuff in store for you this week.
